category_sources: source_facts.description says EiffelStudio is a development environment for the Eiffel language; official EiffelStudio page calls it an open-source IDE.
display_name_sources: source_facts.description names EiffelStudio functionality; official EiffelStudio page uses the EiffelStudio name.
docs_sources: Official EiffelStudio page links to docs.eiffel.com for installation and project documentation; dev.eiffel.com is the official EiffelStudio project wiki.
repo_sources: Official EiffelStudio Source Code page says the most recent source can be obtained with git clone git@github.com:EiffelSoftware/EiffelStudio.git.
tags_sources: source_facts.description describes an Eiffel development environment; official EiffelStudio page lists compiler, editor, debugger, and GUI development features.
